steps.title: Write the load expression
steps.content:
The truck carries a $210$-pound machine, $x$ boxes weighing $28$ pounds each, and $y$ boxes weighing $64$ pounds each. The total weight is
$$210+28x+64y$$

steps.title: Apply the capacity limit
steps.content:
The total weight can be at most $5{,}940$ pounds:
$$210+28x+64y\le 5{,}940$$
Subtract $210$ from both sides:
$$28x+64y\le 5{,}730$$

steps.title: Match the inequality
steps.content:
The inequality with the correct weights and maximum remaining capacity is
$$28x+64y\le 5{,}730$$
The answer is A.
